text: thrashed the tube fluid into a foam spiral.
drew boobs on tube glass.
tapped out rythyms on tank filter.
screamed for 2 hours straight.
wont stop touching hot surfaces.
swallowed a guitar pick and looked smug about it.
filled all the soundholes with what looks like mud.
learned jazz against your wishes.
ate all the patch cables.
posted a cryptic 3:14 AM rant.
mad at world.
embarassed from their brutal skateboarding-fail gone viral.
trashed the shared room and blamed acoustics.
started a petty feud with a sound tech.
wrote a masterpiece and refused to explain it.
ate 3 pounds of gas station food.
left their gear in an airport bathroom.
completely nailed that solo.
invented new shredding technique.
green room lacked avacado-toast... Again!
had meltdown on local news interview.
threw TV out of hotel room window.
having existential crisis about their own creation.
slept in the merch bin.
